text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "patient admitted for pneumonia from COVID A - clear airways B - eupnoeic with NC 2l/min SpO2 97% RF 16 breaths/min, no pathological respiratory sounds, slight use of accessory muscles C - capillary refill <2sec, HR 108 BP 146/84, symmetrical and normal arterial pulses in all 4 limbs, D - alert, cooperative, and oriented to time/place, GCS 15, isochoric, isocyclic, and normally reactive pupils, no unilateral motor and sensory deficit E - skin intact, of normal color, and normally hydrated Temp 39.1 > paracetamol 1g therapy administered as prescribed awaiting hospitalization at PERSONS_NAME Hospital", 0.0, 0.1)
